description: Complete indoor class with no unresolved logistics.

request.shortDescription: An after-school introduction to folding, stitching, and decorating a simple booklet together.
request.fullDescription: Families rotate through a short hands-on lesson about paper folding, binding thread, and cover decoration. The organizer will bring enough materials for every participant and the library has already confirmed table space and elevator access.
request.accessibilityNotes: Library entrance and activity room are wheelchair accessible.
request.facilitatorBio: Tara is a volunteer arts instructor for the branch library maker table.
request.publicationGoal: Publish a library website card and a family newsletter note.

description: A request that should hold for manual review because the publishing prerequisites are incomplete.

request.shortDescription: A beginner-friendly drawing exchange where participants sketch storefronts and swap quick prompts with each other.
request.fullDescription: Participants meet for a one-hour sketch session and a guided prompt exchange. The organizer plans to bring pencils and clipboards, but the venue has not yet confirmed the room setup or entrance details.
request.targetAudience: Beginners who want a relaxed creative meetup
request.facilitatorBio: Lena coordinates the monthly sketch walk for the Greenway arts table.
request.publicationGoal: Prepare a website listing and a quick organizer digest.

description: Outdoor workshop without a weather fallback.

request.shortDescription: A short demo on drying, labeling, and storing seeds from a shared garden plot.
request.fullDescription: Community gardeners gather for a practical seed-saving walkthrough followed by a short Q&A. The organizer already has packets, labels, and a folding table ready, but has not named a rain location if the courtyard closes.
request.accessibilityNotes: Pathway is paved and the organizer can reserve bench seating nearby.
request.facilitatorBio: Omar leads the seasonal community garden volunteer orientation.
request.publicationGoal: Publish a bulletin blurb and coordinator note for the volunteer mailing list.
